name: SDK Plugin
description: A starter template for developing WpfHexEditor plugins using the official SDK.

files.content:
# {{ProjectName}}

WpfHexEditor SDK Plugin — created on {{Date}}.

## Getting Started

1. Open `{{ProjectName}}.cs` and implement your plugin logic.
2. Update `plugin.manifest.json` with your plugin metadata.
3. Build the project and copy the output to `%AppData%\WpfHexEditor\Plugins\`.
